page: Microsoft Azure D32nlds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dnldv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture using Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 32 dedicated virtual CPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage options. It does not include integrated graphics processing units, making it a CPU-only compute resource. The hardware profile is designed with a lower memory-to-CPU ratio, prioritizing network throughput and local storage capacity over large memory footprints.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the allocation of 2.0 GB of RAM per core positions this instance as a resource-dense option for workloads that require substantial processing power and local disk space without the overhead of excess memory. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include network-intensive applications, distributed file systems, web serving, and database nodes that utilize local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure D32nlds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine from the Dnldv6 family, powered by an Intel x86_64 processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This instance provides 32 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per vCPU ratio. It features 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it lacks GPU acceleration. Designed for scenarios requiring significant compute capacity and local disk space with a lower memory footprint, this server is structured for cost-efficient resource allocation. It is suited for network-intensive applications, web serving, and distributed database workloads that benefit from high-throughput networking and fast local storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance for multi-threaded tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32nlds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, designed for low-memory, compute-heavy workloads.
